query: 能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍

transcript.content: 或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？
能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍
我已经替你自动跑了一遍： ```bash node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown ```

decision.archive_summary: Resolved repo task around Codex Context Minor GC regression coverage and validation. Durable outcome to preserve as pins: the fix was not a whitelist workaround; packaged guard was tightened so it cannot override shadow-guard vetoes, and the harder natural-Chinese multi-turn topic-switch regression was added to fixed live eval coverage. Latest exchange also records that the runnable live eval was executed successfully via `node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown`.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active request was to rerun the previously failing automated test, and the assistant reported it was run. Earlier turns describe now-resolved implementation details and status checks for the same completed task, so the conversation mostly closes. Raw history can shrink aggressively; only the durable fix/regression outcome and the fact that the automated eval was run should survive as compact pins.
